prompt: Create a compliance tracking plan for a project subject to GDPR and SOX with 25 compliance items.
assertions: catalogs all compliance requirements by regulation type
defines audit trail with evidence collection methods

prompt: Prepare for an external audit in 6 weeks with 30 compliance items needing evidence.
assertions: creates evidence checklist per compliance item
prioritizes evidence collection by audit risk

prompt: Gap assessment reveals 5 unaddressed HIPAA requirements after scope expanded to include patient data.
assertions: assesses severity of newly discovered gaps
creates remediation plan with owners and deadlines
defines evidence requirements for each gap

prompt: Track compliance in an agile project with continuous delivery and no traditional phase gates.
assertions: integrates compliance checks into sprint Definition of Done
automates compliance evidence collection where possible
maps continuous delivery to compliance checkpoints
maintains audit trail despite rapid iteration
